title: Well-Known Labels, Annotations and Taints — kube-scheduler-simulator.sigs.k8s.io/permit-result
text:
Type: Annotation
Example:
kube-scheduler-simulator.sigs.k8s.io/permit-result: '{"CustomPermitPlugin":"success"}'
Used on: Pod
This annotation records the result of permit scheduler plugins, used by
https://sigs.k8s.io/kube-scheduler-simulator
.

Type: Annotation
Example:
kube-scheduler-simulator.sigs.k8s.io/permit-result-timeout: '{"CustomPermitPlugin":"10s"}'
Used on: Pod
This annotation records the timeouts returned from permit scheduler plugins, used by
https://sigs.k8s.io/kube-scheduler-simulator
.
